{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032112232916DA5FC80BD593C81E01"}"},"total":451},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7401423543232447257","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很新颖！！剧情节奏把握的很好，人设也基本没有ooc，最后琴酒与黑泽的厮杀即出乎意料又好像在情理之中，琴酒一直都是理性冷静的TK，我想不到比这更好的结局了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723280788,"group_id":"7335457501581691929","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"为了野犬","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzeB5FrGduYYvdslE5+oP8w=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e7df4f5d7d1e456ab6d3951b065f2932~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621167&x-signature=RSHs033tNTdVd4uBrLVilHAPCYA%3D","user_id":"97816943771","user_name":"猛吸乱步猫猫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"97816943771","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7335457501581691929","book_info":{"abstract":"【标签有误！衍生同人+双男主】
【提醒:纯黑+不变红+不救红方+红方和贝尔摩德死亡预警+双男主】
【主角:黑泽阵ⅹ琴酒，黑泽阵为平行世界作者自设琴酒同位体，另类水仙。】
自认为普普通通的黑泽阵遇到了一件不普通的事情。他穿越了，穿越到同位体的身体里了。
坏消息:同位体的灵魂仍然存在。
好消息:同位体很可爱，他很喜欢。
出于某种考虑，黑泽阵决定自称琴酒的第二人格，反正他们是同位体，他可不就是另一个琴酒吗？
所以他自称琴酒的第二人格，合情合理。
